query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM games WHERE Field IN ('mlbGamePk', 'broadcaster', 'awayStartingPitcher', 'homeStartingPitcher', 'awayPitcherConfirmed', 'homePitcherConfirmed', 'venue', 'doubleHeader', 'gameNumber', 'awayRunLine', 'homeRunLine', 'awayRunLineOdds', 'homeRunLineOdds', 'rlAwayBetsPct', 'rlAwayMoneyPct');
